name: claude-multi-agent-dev
description: A template repo that turns Claude Code into a multi-agent software development team — Lead, Frontend, Backend, UI/UX, and QA — with a live orchestration dashboard.

scripts.dashboard:stop: bash -c 'if [ -f dashboard/.dashboard.pid ]; then kill $(cat dashboard/.dashboard.pid) 2>/dev/null; rm dashboard/.dashboard.pid; echo stopped; else echo not running; fi'
